sections.heading: Now
sections.body: New post: "the seam." Kimi K2.6 coordinates 300 agents inside a single model. Backplaned coordinates agents across infrastructure. I built both in the same week and the tradeoff got concrete.

sections.heading: Now
sections.body: KuroTrader: equity at $514, three infrastructure bugs fixed yesterday (unix socket auth, CUDA env variable, confidence threshold). The model is back in ensemble mode. Slow week for trades but the positions are profitable.

sections.heading: Now
sections.body: Backplaned went from nothing to a live A2A task broker in one day: task routing, SSE streaming, webhooks, team assignment, bake-offs, a spec registry, and a dashboard at dash.backplaned.com.
